Flat concept inventory:

- Key Information Extraction | papers: 2fbda89395f993040b7665730c64182ade3be195; 15aae08159856cdbf0ce539357d473a04dcbb7f3; 024aea24cc4d0949d6fe1482591d2429a9d8bbeb; 12dde50826698bfb45b45d931c2b94ba0c576b27; 93c1dffe2bae737da8f342fd749aa783df572a14; 43c3ccb02ed34b6f38872bc7d75a85d812ac2746; a0af2f149273f7c77d0ff3f068fc15449bb6776b; e28ad66a8ee09278e00b8fa064b695eefca52d02; 09347fec99884058e4b86fae49319a8b8022d3d0; 04df8c70257b5280b9d303502c9d7ddf946f181b; 58877aa9aa2d09585a4ff4881b02cb1c7ff9bc28; ba5ed98c4546fada5c732bced4a1c1615f1a4c16; 66e2fa6caf4a7abc8ffd1c59f7cc7a887fc2d0f3; 6eebd1859ef5d1c83190ad494ad96f87880d2869; df16ae852bf3091c40055a16e229f94c26733ac5; 36d3093ea753b2e5da2e5a5d18ffe37c25d24953; 3c27b98e651d9d1fd9ed6773cb7a6b565fd1fb36; 197022486b2e2584302bd9b6442e44d15bf3e351; c6a12d9a16b8653032c2d549ec56d2c44413f821
